Source.Name: toybox
Source.Summary: Common Linux command line utilities together into a single BSD-licensed executable.
Source.Description: Toybox combines many common Linux command line utilities together into a single BSD-licensed executable. It's simple, small, fast, and reasonably standards-compliant (POSIX-2008 and LSB 4.1).

Package.Name: toybox
Package.Summary: Common Linux command line utilities together into a single BSD-licensed executable.
Package.Description: Toybox combines many common Linux command line utilities together into a single BSD-licensed executable. It's simple, small, fast, and reasonably standards-compliant (POSIX-2008 and LSB 4.1).
